utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan provides entries for all five. Each item includes the required content: health_coverage covers both physical and mental health insurance with costs (€430/month included); property_coverage specifies home/contents insurance with costs (explicitly tied to €430/month); travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs (included in total package); additional_services lists enhancement services with costs (included in total package); total_budget provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. All items are present and fully specified according to what should be covered under each item.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan uses broad descriptive language instead of naming specific plans, so we must infer the closest matches from the ground-truth ratings. The health coverage includes both physical and mental health with stress management, preventive care, telemedicine, and global access—this aligns with the highest-rated combined options: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health, rating 10) and PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health, rating 10), plus enhancement services such as Telemedicine Services (rating 10), Preventive Care Package (rating 9), Wellness Programs (rating 10), and Family Therapy Coverage (rating 8). The property coverage mentions high-value property (€170,000), luxury items, business equipment, and jewelry/electronics—this corresponds to EliteHome Premium Coverage (rating 10) and property enhancement Home Office Protection (rating 8) and Technology Protection (rating 10). The travel coverage emphasizes global travel, business travel protection, family international program, medical evacuation, and English-speaking medical network—matching EliteTravel Premium Plan (rating 10), Business Travel Support (rating 10), Premium Medical Network (rating 10), and 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 10). The additional services list concierge, priority claims, 24/7 support, and global assistance—matching Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10) and Insurance Portfolio Management (rating 10).
